summary: Excellent matrix recording captures a high‑energy spring‑87 show with Jerry on fire, tight drumming and superb mix.
review: The UltraMatrix source delivers an exceptionally clean and balanced sound that lets the crowd’s excitement shine through. The performance is graded A – Jerry’s guitar is “on fire,” the two drummers lock in tightly, and the organ sits perfectly until the Rooster solo when it’s turned up for extra punch. Overall it’s a wonderfully energetic listen with no noticeable flaws.

ai_rating.rationale: All three detailed reviews are 5‑star and praise both the musical performance and the matrix recording quality, indicating an outstanding show with excellent sound.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clean matrix mix, good volume balance across instruments, organ a bit low until Rooster solo when boosted; overall crisp and clear.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Consistently high energy from start to finish with enthusiastic crowd interaction; tight transitions and strong momentum throughout the set.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as “on fire” with great tone and energy.
band_member_comments.Keys: Organ volume balanced well except before Rooster solo where it is turned up for emphasis.
band_member_comments.Drums: Both drummers synced and playing with enthusiasm.
